message:
perf(tree-shake): skip polyfill modules when require() not used

Added usesRequire() check to detect if code uses require() at all.
If not, skip all polyfill modules (core.js, path.js, buffer.js, events.js).

Results for hello world:
- Before: 52KB / 1018 lines
- After: 10.8KB / 273 lines (91% reduction)

Code using require() still gets full polyfill support.
